title: Gift drop
description: Find gifts after sleeping, or craft them yourself. Unwrap foods and unique items. And give gifts to friends!
body:
![Title and preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/68fcf70f3c16d4ac3581a513188a306fd1af3784_0.webp)

![Gift style divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4451368971902d6f9b8b33133d151391ff5b77c0.png)

### **This mod adds a variety of festive content. Find gifts falling after sleeping, exposed to air in caves, or craft them yourself. Unwrap foods and unique items. And give gifts to friends!**

![Gift style divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4451368971902d6f9b8b33133d151391ff5b77c0.png)

**After sleeping there's a chance to find a gift
falling from the sky. Or you can find them
exposed to air in caves, and even craft them.
Each gift has a guaranteed item drop,
along with a random item from a pool of 26!**

**(You can change the fall chance in the gamerules)**

--------------------------------------------------------------

**Opening gifts will give fun and festive loot.
Unwrap Gingerbread Slime, Candy Cane swords,
Joke cards, and more. If you're on the naughty
list you'll get coal instead,
killing an innocent creature will put you on it.**

(Disable in the gamerules)

---------------------------------------------------------------

**Decorate a christmas tree with gifts under it.
Craft festive gifts and give them to friends,
or prank them instead with prank gifts. Prank gifts can give a
fake diamond pickaxe, spawn reindeer droppings,
do a confetti explosion and more!**

![Gift style divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4451368971902d6f9b8b33133d151391ff5b77c0.png)

![Every recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3fbc67c282d43499b977bdd99913b0f8918bd655.png)
